name: ExtensionActivityDefinition_AsNeeded
title: R5: Preconditions for service (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ActivityDefinition.asNeeded[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ActivityDefinition.asNeeded[x]` 0..1 `boolean, CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ActivityDefinition.asNeeded[x]` 0..1 `boolean, CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ActivityDefinition.asNeeded[x]` has a context of ActivityDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ActivityDefinition`.
Element `ActivityDefinition.asNeeded[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `ActivityDefinition.asNeeded[x]` has a context of ActivityDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ActivityDefinition`.
Element `ActivityDefinition.asNeeded[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: If a CodeableConcept is present, it indicates the pre-condition for performing the service.  For example "pain", "on flare-up", etc.
